overall.description: A first-person exploration of the Gryffindor common room from a Harry Potter video game (Hogwarts Legacy). The player moves through a stone corridor into a grand, sunlit common room featuring medieval architecture, red tapestries, a roaring stone fireplace, and students in wizard robes relaxing and socializing.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with towering stack of chairs

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the chair stack reaching toward the ceiling
camera pans right to reveal the wooden door and red house banner

agents.ego_description: standing in the corridor examining the precarious stack of chairs and surrounding stone architecture

entered.detail: tall precarious tower of stacked wooden chairs reaching toward the vaulted ceiling
large cylindrical stone pillar with carved details
full suit of medieval armor standing against the wall
dark wooden door with arched stone frame leading to the common room
tall pile of books stacked against the left wall
small golden lion statue on a hexagonal pedestal

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow stone corridor dominated by a towering, chaotic stack of wooden chairs. The camera first examines the stack from bottom to top, then pans right to reveal a suit of armor and a wooden door marked with a red banner.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor approaching the common room entrance

events.description: passing through the wooden doorway into the bright, spacious common room

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor toward and through the wooden door into the common room

entered.detail: long red banner with golden lion emblem hanging on the wall
decorative stone arch framing the corridor entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the stone corridor toward the wooden door, passing the red house banner. At the end of the segment, the door opens to reveal the bright interior of the Gryffindor common room.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room main hall with central fireplace

events.description: approaching the large stone fireplace, warm firelight becomes the dominant illumination
camera stops and focuses on the burning fire within the stone hearth

agents.ego_description: entering the common room and walking toward the large stone fireplace to examine it

notable_agents.action: student in black robes standing near the back wall observing the room
student in black robes walking across the room toward the fireplace

entered.detail: massive stone fireplace with carved lion statues flanking the hearth
bright orange flames burning within the fireplace grate
tall dark wood cabinets with glass doors containing books and artifacts
walls covered in red and gold patterned tapestries and hanging fabrics
antique celestial globe on a decorative silver stand

segments.scene_description: Upon entering the common room, the camera moves through a space filled with wooden furniture and students in robes. The segment focuses on approaching the massive stone fireplace with its roaring fire, flanked by carved stone lions and surrounded by rich red tapestries.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room study corner with portraits and bookshelves

events.description: camera pans upward to examine the portrait paintings hanging on the wall
camera continues panning to reveal hanging house banners and additional portraits

agents.ego_description: examining the wall decorations and portraits while moving along the side of the room

notable_agents.action: student sitting in leather armchair reading a book near the wall

entered.detail: several framed oil portraits of historical figures in wizard attire
tall mahogany bookcases filled with leather-bound books
large brown leather armchair with tufted upholstery
blue and gold house banner suspended from the ceiling
large oval mirror with ornate gold frame hanging on the wall

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the fireplace, the camera explores a cozy corner featuring leather seating and walls adorned with moving portraits and hanging banners. The camera pans upward to examine the artwork and architectural details of the vaulted ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit seating area near gothic windows

events.description: moving into bright sunlight streaming through large gothic windows creating dramatic light beams
camera approaches and circles around a student sitting on a sofa near the window

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit area of the common room, passing students relaxing on sofas and armchairs

notable_agents.action: student sitting on yellow sofa reading a book in the sunlight
student sitting in armchair with back to camera, wearing pointed wizard hat

entered.detail: tall gothic arched windows with diamond-patterned glass panes letting in bright sunlight
tall brass floor lamp with glass globe shade
upholstered armchair in burnt orange fabric near the window

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a brightly lit area near the tall gothic windows, where sunlight streams across the red carpets. Students are scattered throughout, reading on sofas and conversing in small groups, while the camera navigates between the furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: central common room with dining tables and fireplace

events.description: returning to view of the fireplace from the opposite side, showing the full room layout
camera pans across the room showing students gathered at long wooden tables

agents.ego_description: circulating back toward the center of the room, observing groups of students socializing near the fireplace and tables

notable_agents.action: group of three students in black robes conversing near the fireplace
student walking through the room carrying books

entered.detail: long wooden dining tables with chairs arranged around them

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a wide view of the common room from the center, revealing long wooden tables where students gather. The camera pans to show the fireplace from the opposite side, completing the circuit of the room and showcasing the full scope of the space with its red decor and medieval furnishings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, dim stone corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched warmth of the Gryffindor common room. It begins by examining a chaotic stack of wooden chairs and a suit of armor before gliding past a red house banner toward a wooden door. As the door opens, the scene expands into a grand interior where the camera moves past students in robes toward a massive stone fireplace flanked by carved lions and rich red tapestries. The perspective then shifts through cozy corners of leather seating and moving portraits, panning upward toward the vaulted ceiling before drifting into the bright light of gothic windows and red carpets. Finally, the camera pulls back to a wide central view, navigating between long wooden tables to capture the full scope of the medieval furnishings and the glowing hearth from across the room.
